channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bills to re-sign Hamlin. Buffalo also adds defensive tackle Ogunjobi to 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Safety Damar Hamlin is returning to Buffalo, and the Bills also continued restocking their defensive front by agreeing to sign tackle Larry Ogunjobi on Wednesday. The Bills announced reaching an agreement to sign Hamlin to a one-year contract.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL players score a shot at Hollywood through hands-on training sessions with filmmaker Deon Taylor
item.description: SANTA MONICA, Calif. (AP) — Isaac Ukwu's sights were solely set on just playing in the NFL — until two season-ending knee injuries in college served as a harsh reality of football's fragility. The setbacks reshaped Ukwu's perspective, showing him that football was part of him, but not all of him.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 5th anniversary of COVID cancellations brings back painful memories for teams, NCAA officials
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Robert Morris coach Andrew Toole stood next to the staging area near midcourt Tuesday night, the confetti strewn around him as the Colonials danced, mingled with fans and climbed ladders to cut down the nets.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mallory Swanson will miss Chicago Stars' NWSL season opener for personal reasons
item.description: Chicago Stars forward Mallory Swanson will miss the team’s National Women’s Soccer League season opener on Friday night against the Orlando Pride for personal reasons.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Legendary college football coach Urban Meyer explains why he likes 14-team CFP system
item.description: Urban Meyer believes a 14-team College Football Playoff system could be good for the game of football, though it has one big caveat in it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rick Pitino wins 1st Big East Coach of the Year award and RJ Luis Jr. is Player of the Year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Add another accolade to Rick Pitino's incredible resume. This was a new one, too — which might come as a surprise. Pitino won his first Big East Coach of the Year award on Wednesday and RJ Luis Jr. took Player of the Year honors after they propelled a resurgent St.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rams release Super Bowl 56 MVP Cooper Kupp
item.description: The Los Angles Rams cut Super Bowl 56 MVP Cooper Kupp after being unable to find a trade partner for their former No. 1 wide receiver. The Rams officially moved on from the 2021 AP NFL Offensive Player of the Year at the start of the league year on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose State leads from start to finish in Mountain West tournament opener
item.description: The No. 8 seeded Spartans scored the first 12 points of the game and never trailed in beating Wyoming for the third time this season.
item.dc:creator: Bay Area News Group, The Mercury News

item.title: West Virginia football coach says he's banning his players from dancing on TikTok
item.description: Rich Rodriguez isn't banning social media, but he is prohibiting the West Virginia football players from posting dancing videos to TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PGA Tour’s Adam Scott shares message to Trump after White House meeting
item.description: After two visits to the White House, PGA Tour player director Adam Scott realized President Donald Trump has "more important things" to focus on than making a deal with LIV Golf work.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cheating scandal shocks ski jumping, topples Olympic champions and shakes Norway's lofty reputation
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Sign stealing in baseball. Match fixing in soccer. Doping allegations in swimming. Now ski jumping has its own scandal that escalated Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A stint in the minors forced Pens' goalie Tristan Jarry to hit the reset button. It may have worked
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Tristan Jarry's career was at a crossroads in mid-January. The Pittsburgh Penguins goaltender was struggling and even worse, the franchise's faith in him appeared to be shot.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: West Virginia's Rodriguez bans TikTok dancing. He says videos erase 'hard edge' team should portray
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.Va. (AP) — West Virginia coach Rich Rodriguez, like all football coaches, wants his players to show up on time, work hard and play their best. Oh, and another thing: Don't dance on TikTok. “They're going to be on it, so I’m not banning them from it,” he said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saunders earns first team All-Big 12 honors
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fresh off leading No. 17 BYU to its eighth straight win on Saturday, Richie Saunders was named the Big 12 Most Improved Player and claimed First Team All-Big honors. Egor Demin earned honorable mention all-conference and all-freshman accolades.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes highest-paid non-QB in NFL history
item.description: Garrett, the 2023 AP DPOY, had asked for a trade last month but the Browns were adamant about keeping the 29-year-old star in Cleveland.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Colorado Springs upset CMU Mavericks to secure RMAC Championship
item.description: UC Colorado Springs defeated Colorado Mesa 63-61 to win the RMAC championship, with Amyah Moore Allen scoring 28 points and Olivia Reed Thyne scoring 18 points.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Utah Valley clinches WAC regular season title
item.description: STEPHENVILLE, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Dominick Nelson matched a career high with 25 points, and Carter Welling added 18 as Utah Valley defeated Tarleton State 71-66 in a sold-out Wisdom Gym on Saturday night, closing out WAC play with a statement win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giddey scores 26 to lead Bulls' comeback from 17 down to beat the Heat 114-109
item.description: Josh Giddey scored 26 points and the Chicago Bulls rallied from a 17-point, first-half deficit to beat the Miami Heat 114-109 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Connor Bedard scores in overtime to lift Blackhawks to 4-3 win over Utah
item.description: Connor Bedard scored 3:10 into overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory over the Utah Hockey Club on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: A's announce 3-year Las Vegas sponsorship as club looks toward future move
item.description: The Athletics will play in Northern California for at least the next three seasons, but will also represent their future home in Las Vegas and brought four of their star players to drive home that point.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox reassign top 2 prospects to minor-league camp, team announces Thursday
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. — The White Sox reassigned two of their top prospects to minor-league camp, one a west suburban native, the team announced Thursday morning prior to its spring training game against the San Francisco Giants.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Shorthanded Jazz lose to last place Wizards, 125-122
item.description: WASHINGTON, D.C. (ABC4 Sports) - Kyshawn George scored 23 points, Alex Sarr added 21 and the Washington Wizards edged the Utah Jazz 125-122 on Wednesday night in a battle of two last place teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Volleyball: The Bishop's School 3, La Jolla 1
item.description: Boys Volleyball matchup is the battle of Pearl street between The Bishop's school Knights and La Jolla Vikings.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5
